entries.sensitivity: sanitized diagnostic; contains task ids, process ids, user id, and aggregate findings; no full private process payload export
entries.notes: Moved from repository root so task seed diagnostics live under inputs/diagnostics.
Registers the Codex Stop hook that runs foundry acceptance checks before an agent turn finishes.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive local hook script; writes runtime logs under ignored .foundry/state/
entries.notes: Runs npm run acceptance:check and translates blocking failures into a Codex Stop hook block decision.
Defines how foundry distinguishes local orchestration from shared CLI, skill, runtime, database, Edge, and schema capabilities.
Routes missing capabilities to foundry, CLI, skills, calculator, database, Edge Functions, or TIDAS tooling.
Template for routing reusable missing capabilities to their owning workspace project with explicit contracts.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive governance policy; references only optional account display labels, not credentials
entries.notes: Defines optional runtime account labels and separates human account hints from AI credential/session authority.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive governance policy; defines public env example ownership and forbidden adjacent-repo internals
entries.notes: Prevents CLI/test-only or operator-private variables from being promoted into foundry .env.example during automatic runs.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive governance runbook; contains no credentials and no full private payload export
entries.notes: Defines account-wide process/flow audit, repair queue, write, readback, UI, and compute-validation constraints for the current profile repair program.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive architecture design; contains no credentials and no private dataset payloads
entries.notes: Defines the target layering where Foundry routes to a top-level dataset authoring skill, the top-level skill composes reusable child skills, and child skills call public CLI commands.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive BAFU import profile; excludes runtime account ids, thread guards, credentials, and full private payload exports
entries.notes: Durable Foundry-facing BAFU import profile for the resumable source-intake to readback-verify workflow. Runtime task outputs and account guard details stay under ignored .foundry/workspaces/.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive BAFU-specific import rules; excludes runtime account ids, thread guards, credentials, and full private payload exports
entries.notes: Cleaned durable constraints migrated from the BAFU runtime workspace. Runtime-specific account guards, absolute workspace paths, and full payload evidence remain runtime-only and are intentionally not registered as previous_paths.

entries.sensitivity: sanitized row identifiers, versions, state codes, and short metadata summaries only; no credentials or full private payload export
entries.notes: Reusable sample index for future process/flow identity-preflight and reference-closure tests. Runtime payload snapshots stay under ignored .foundry/workspaces/issue-3/account-sample-scenarios/.

entries.sensitivity: sanitized row identifiers, versions, state codes, validation results, and short metadata summaries only; no credentials or full private payload export
entries.notes: Current-profile dataset selection for automated LCA data-production development. Runtime payload snapshots and validation artifacts stay under ignored .foundry/workspaces/example-account-dataset-selection-2026-05-23/.

entries.sensitivity: non-sensitive command and artifact contracts; no credentials or private payloads
entries.notes: Routes automated LCA tasks to the generic Foundry task router, sample-scenario dry-runs, shared CLI identity-preflight/build-plan/schema/review/bilingual/publish gates, and a foundry-local elementary-flow provider-closure eligibility gate.

entries.sensitivity: sanitized dry-run decisions and relative runtime artifact paths only; no credentials or full private payload export
entries.notes: Repo-visible summary of the Foundry sample-scenario dry-run. Full command captures and gate artifacts stay under ignored .foundry/workspaces/issue-5/sample-scenario-dry-run/.
